title: Approval node
description: A human approval (or rejection) decision. A human approval event is mandatory before any client-facing release; no agent may author one. Carried in an approval.recorded event under payload.node. TOLERANT v0 draft: additionalProperties is permissive; decision is an open string in v0.1 (it does not trace to a locked decision or a PRD node sketch), documented against candidate values, not enum-enforced.

id.description: Node ID embedding the artifact ID, e.g. approval:association-board-brief-001:a001.

approver.description: Typed actor ID of the approver. MUST be a human in practice; not pattern-enforced here in v0.1.

decision.description: Approval outcome. v0.1 candidate values (documented in provenance/release-state-machine.md, not enum-enforced here): approved, rejected, changes_requested. Enum freeze deferred to phase-end.

scope.description: What was approved, e.g. the artifact version or release channel the approval covers.
